articles.title: John McAfee's GHOST Coin Dumps Cardano (ADA) for Polygon (MATIC)
articles.description: Privacy coin created based on idea of now-passed John McAfee has chosen to switch from Cardano to Polygon

articles.title: DForce protocol drained of $3.6 million in reentrancy attack
articles.description: DForce DeFi protocol suffered a loss of $3.6 million in a reentrancy attack on the Arbitrum and Optimism chains.

articles.title: Ethereum price risks 20% correction amid SEC’s crackdown on crypto staking
articles.description: Ethereum may experience a drop in user activity alongside ETH price, with crypto staking in the crosshairs of the SEC.

articles.title: $SHIB, $ADA, $DOT, and Others Added As Payment Methods at Dubai University via New Integration
articles.description: The meme-inspired cryptocurrency Shiba Inu ($SHIB), the native token of smart contract platform Cardano ($ADA), and that of the ‘blockchain of blockchains’ Polkadot ($DOT) can now be used as payment method at a popular Dubai University, along with several other digital assets. According to a recently published announcement, prospective and current students at Canadian University […]
